data.body:
G3 container coverage review (parent 3fe1 + this grounding/_engine_support sweep child): clean — no findings.

This child covers the `grounding/` + `_engine_support/` slice of the parent and uniquely owns the BLE0001-typo landmine. 4-bucket map vs parent acceptance/success criteria for THIS pairing (absences cross-checked against the whole sibling roster):

- AC1 (logging substrate + stdout-purity test): structural — covered by sibling 8fbd.
- AC2 (exemplar llm/plan_review + enable BLE001/T201 + shrinking allowlist): structural — covered by 16a1.
- AC3 (~100 unguarded broad-except sites remediated in batches; no silent `except: pass` without justification): PARTIAL — this child remediates `src/rebar/grounding/` + `src/rebar/_engine_support/` to the observability floor. Remainder tiled by sibling sweeps 8d01 (__init__/reducer/graph/_store), ceaa (mcp_server/llm/workflow/llm-top-level), fd72 (_cli/_commands), 0569 (_engine/rebar_reconciler). The AC3 package partition has no orphaned package.
- AC4 (opportunistic narrowing surfaced a hidden bug → fix + regression test): PARTIAL/contributory — this child narrows/justifies the `grounding/harness.py:281` `except BaseException`; pattern set by 16a1, other instances in 8d01/ceaa/0569.
- AC5 (allowlist emptied; make lint + full suite pass; children parented w/ file-impact): PARTIAL — this child removes its own packages from the BLE001/T201 allowlist and is parented to 3fe1 with file_impact set; final emptying + gate is 0ec1.
- SC1 (one lint-enforced way): contributory — convention established by 16a1, finalized by 0ec1; this child conforms its surfaces.
- SC2 (silent failures observable on stderr logger; KeyboardInterrupt/SystemExit never swallowed; stdout pure): PARTIAL — this child UNIQUELY covers the `grounding/harness.py:281` landmine where a typo'd `# noqa: BLE0001` (extra 0) leaves an `except BaseException` inert/unguarded; fixing the typo + ensuring KI/SE are no longer swallowed is a direct SC2 contribution, plus the grounding/_engine_support stderr-print→named-logger migration. Substrate in 8fbd.
- SC3 (future audit clean; new offenders fail CI): structural — gate enabled by 16a1, final audit by 0ec1.

Absence cross-check vs the whole sibling roster: no parent acceptance/success criterion is left uncovered, and no coverage gap is attributable to this pairing. The child's scope is fully subsumed by parent AC3/AC4/SC2 (no scope outside the parent). Clean — empty findings list.
